name: Waiver of Tax on Excess Net Passive Income

eligibility.description: The S corporation must establish it determined in good faith it had no accumulated E&P and must distribute such E&P within a reasonable period after discovery.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a mechanism for the Secretary to waive the penalty tax on excess passive investment income if the S corporation acted in good faith and distributes the offending earnings and profits.
